title: Global Normalization of Brand Boutiques
goal: Ensure consistency and standardization of Brand Boutiques across all divisions and regions.
description: Conduct a comprehensive review of all active Brand Boutiques to establish a clear, up-to-date snapshot by division. Identify and assess version discrepancies, including inconsistencies or parallel versions of the same Brand Boutique across regions. Drive close alignment and collaboration with Emotion+ and the brands to harmonize layouts, content structures, and asset usage. Define and implement a global versus regional standardization strategy, prioritizing global consistency wherever feasible, while ensuring strong regional coherence when full global alignment is not achievable.
